title: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 – Overview

detail.title: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 – Overview
detail.short_info: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 is now available online for Rajasthan University UG exams. Download Rajasthan University admit card 2026 from erp.univraj.org, check exam date, centre, and instructions.

content.text: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 has been released online for Rajasthan University UG exams, and students can download their admit card from the official ERP portal erp.univraj.org using their login credentials.

sections.heading: Uniraj Admit Card 2026 Direct Link (Rajasthan University ERP Portal)

content.text: Rajasthan University is issuing the Uniraj Admit Card 2026 through its dedicated ERP portal, which acts as the central hub for student services.

items: ERP login for admit card: Click Here
Rajasthan University official website (time table, notices, news): Click Here

content.text: Students must log in with their ERP or student credentials to access and download the admit card. The hall ticket is not sent by post or distributed manually at colleges; it is available only in online mode.

sections.heading: How to Download Uniraj Admit Card 2026 Online

content.text: Step-by-step process to download Rajasthan University admit card 2026

items: Open a browser on your mobile or computer and visit erp.univraj.org.
Click on the Student Login / ERP Login option shown on the home page.
Enter your user ID / enrollment number and password or date of birth, as asked on the login screen.
After logging in, go to the Examination / Admit Card section in your dashboard.
Select your course, year/semester and relevant exam (for example, BA 1st Year, BSc 3rd Year, UG Semester Exam 2026).
Click on the “Admit Card 2026” or the specific exam admit card link.
Your Uniraj Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen showing your exam details.
Check all the information carefully, then download the admit card PDF and take one or two printouts.

content.text: If the system shows “no record found” or the admit card is not visible, students should first confirm that their exam form is submitted and then contact their college or the university examination cell if the issue persists.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Rajasthan University Admit Card 2026

content.text: The Rajasthan University admit card 2026 carries all key details required on exam day, so students must verify each field.
You can mention that the admit card generally includes:

items: Student’s name
Father’s and mother’s name
Photograph and signature (if available in the system)
Enrollment / registration number
Examination roll number
Exam name and exam year (UG Exam 2026)
Exam centre name, centre code and full address
Exam date, exam time and reporting time
List of subjects and paper codes (or reference to the official time table)
Important instructions and rules for the examination

content.text: Students should immediately report any serious discrepancy (wrong name, course, exam centre, etc.) to their college or Uniraj exam branch.
This section supports user planning and AI Overviews. Keep dates generic and attributed to the academic session pattern (not exact day-level promises):

items: Admit card availability for UG exams: released before the start of respective exams in 2026.
Rajasthan University UG exams 2026: scheduled as per the official time table for the 2025–26 academic session.
UG annual/semester exam period: usually falls between late February / early March and April (course-wise).
PG exams 2026: typically conducted after major UG exams, according to the academic calendar.

content.text: Always add a line that students must check the latest official time table on the university website for exact subject-wise dates.

sections.heading: Who Can Download Uniraj Admit Card 2026? (Eligibility to Get Hall Ticket)

content.text: Only eligible candidates will see their admit card on the ERP portal.
You can safely state:

items: Students who have filled and submitted the Rajasthan University exam form for the 2025–26 academic session.
Regular, non-college, private and ex-students (where applicable) whose exam forms are accepted by the university.
Candidates whose exam forms are fully verified and fee payment is updated in the university records.
Students whose forms are pending, rejected or not verified may not be able to download the admit card until the issue is resolved.

content.text: Advise students to check form status in the ERP system or with their college if the admit card is not generated.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for Uniraj Admit Card 2026 and Exam Day

content.text: This is high-intent, practical content and helps avoid thin pages.

items: Carry a printed copy of the Uniraj Admit Card 2026 for every exam; soft copies on mobile phones are usually not accepted at the exam centre.
Bring a valid photo ID proof such as Aadhaar card, college ID, voter ID or any other government-approved identity document.
Reach the exam centre well before reporting time mentioned on the admit card to complete verification and seating comfortably.
Read all exam-day instructions on the admit card, including rules about prohibited items (mobile phones, calculators, notes, etc.) and behaviour in the exam hall.
Do not write or scribble on the admit card; sign only in the spaces indicated and preferably in front of the invigilator.
Keep the admit card safe until all written and practical exams are over; it may be required multiple times.

content.text: You can also suggest that students keep a spare printout in case one copy is lost or damaged.
